01
About Me

Bridging enterprise
complexity & clarity.

I'm a Senior Technical Consultant with 8+ years of experience in the Microsoft 365 ecosystem. I specialise in SharePoint Framework (SPFx) development, enterprise intranet modernisation, and the emerging intersection of AI agents with business process automation.

My work sits at the intersection of technical depth and business outcomes — I don't just build solutions, I architect platforms that entire organisations rely on. From migrating Fortune 500 intranets to deploying agentic AI workflows that replace days of manual work, I bring a product mindset to consulting engagements.

Currently available for senior consulting engagements, fractional CTO arrangements, or full-time roles where I can make a meaningful technical impact.

Career

Work experience.

2022 – Present Current

Sr. Technical Consultant

2022 – Present

Contoso Consulting

  • — Led SPFx platform modernisation for 3 enterprise clients, consolidating 300+ legacy SharePoint sites
  • — Architected and deployed multi-agent AI onboarding system reducing manual IT work by 95%
  • — Delivered 15+ intranet transformation projects across financial services, healthcare, and retail verticals
  • — Established reusable SPFx component library adopted across 6 client engagements
2019 – 2022

Technical Consultant

2019 – 2022

Microsoft Partner

  • — Managed end-to-end Microsoft 365 tenant migrations for mid-market clients (500–5,000 users)
  • — Built Power Platform solutions automating HR, procurement, and compliance workflows
  • — Achieved Microsoft Certified: Power Platform Developer Associate certification
  • — Mentored a team of 4 junior consultants in SharePoint and Power Platform development
2017 – 2019

SharePoint Developer

2017 – 2019

Digital Agency

  • — Early SPFx adopter — built custom web parts and extensions for enterprise clients
